description: Founded an AI agency specializing in custom voice solutions that automate business operations and enhance customer experiences across healthcare, finance, insurance, and legal.
achievements: Improved patient communication response times by 60% and reduced administrative workload by 50% by integrating an AI Phone Agent into a Neuroscience Office's Medical Practice Management system — handling incoming calls, appointment scheduling, and after-visit summaries.

Accelerated patient outreach 60% and reduced admin workload 50% by deploying a HIPAA-compliant AI Phone Agent integrated with Veradigm EHR to automate inbound calls, scheduling, and after-visit summaries.

Launched a portfolio of outbound and receptionist voice agents (CRM updates, insurance verification, payments) cutting customer-service costs up to 40% for early adopters in healthcare, finance, legal, and insurance.
Shortened deployment cycles 50% by leading a cross-functional team of engineers and compliance advisors through a secure, reusable voice-AI framework aligned with HIPAA and SOC-2 controls.
